summary: Retire carrier review accepts PR #230 current-pointer-only updates for HARBOR-212; this review covers .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json, .loom/progress/HARBOR-212.md, .loom/reviews/HARBOR-212*.json, and .loom/status/current.md only and does not replace PR #229 implementation evidence.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-08T13:57Z UTC closeout carrier sync passed locally: `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-212 --json`. PR #229 merged at head 85ec3f0a2f0c124ef525e5be182f5d89c71907ed with merge commit 7abd0cdf28e76fcf7335e6320b31b7000ce31f6d. The underlying code validation remained current from 2026-07-08T13:15Z UTC: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test` (30 tests), `pnpm smoke:runtime` (fixture mode only), `git diff --check`, `loom build --target . --item HARBOR-212 --build-evidence .loom/specs/HARBOR-212/build-evidence.json --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, and suite validate/carrier/evidence checks passed locally. `pnpm smoke:runtime:local` was not run because it launches a real local browser and can visit production pages.
follow_ups: Implementation PR #229 remains the product/runtime code evidence for HARBOR-212 screenshot failure evidence semantics; PR #230 only retires the current pointer to idle.
This retire approval does not close Harbor #208/#210/#211/#218 and does not prove App/Core packaged E2E.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: This retire carrier-only PR returns the fact chain to no_active_item after HARBOR-212 closeout; it changes no product/runtime code and does not approve or replace PR #229 implementation behavior.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: PR #230 is a current-pointer retire PR. Product/runtime implementation behavior was delivered and reviewed in PR #229.

carrier_only_closeout_review.reason: Authored retire review approved only current-pointer idle metadata consumption; it does not approve product implementation behavior.
